raw_comment:
1. I noticed China has a greater total electrical generation than the U.S. and India. I also noticed that clean, renewable power tends to be used over fossil fuels.

2. I wonder how this graph was created and what sampling method was used to receive the answers to support this data. 

3. We use power for everything in our everyday lives, we should know where it is coming from, and how much it costs. 

4. Energy & Power

We should know how much power costs.
